title: Prediction of anisotropic property of activated metal inert gas welding by employing different supervised machine learning models☆☆☆
author: Kakade, Khedkar, et al.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: The methodology outlines the systematic approach adopted for the study. It includes the sequence of steps, experimental procedures, and analytical techniques employed throughout the research. The overall workflow of the method is illustrated in Fig. 1.Fig. 1Flowchart indicating the research methodology followed in this study.Fig 1
